The '''Avoni''' were the indigenous [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Avon]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], the Avoni attempted to conquer [[Radnor/Legends|Radnor]] after a bioplague struck the planet, which resulted in death followed by evacuation. They sent [[Dol Heep]], the ambassador of [[Avon]], to conquer the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] when everyone was gone from [[Radnor/Legends|Radnor]].

{{Species-stub}}
